message:
feat(reranker): implement FlashRank nano cross-encoder (bd-23l)

Add FlashRank nano reranker backend using ONNX runtime:
- Cross-encoder architecture for query-document pair scoring
- Batch processing with 32-pair chunks for efficiency
- Sigmoid normalization for probability-like scores
- Auto-discovery of model from standard cache locations

This is a baseline model (pre-2025-11) for reranker evaluation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
